assertions.title: Config validation with OAuth backends — missing required fields

steps.action: Create broken config with missing type field for copilot backend
steps.expected: Proxy refuses to start with clear error about missing field
steps.observed: Proxy exited with code 1: 'validating config: backends[0].api_key: must not be empty for enabled backend' (missing type defaults to openai which requires api_key)

steps.action: Create broken config with missing base_url for copilot backend (type: copilot specified)
steps.expected: Proxy refuses to start with clear error about missing base_url
steps.observed: Proxy exited with code 1: 'validating config: backends[0].base_url: must not be empty for enabled backend'

steps.action: Create config with invalid OAuth auth_url for codex backend
steps.expected: Proxy refuses to start or warns about invalid URL
steps.observed: Proxy started successfully — OAuth URLs are NOT validated at startup (potential gap)

evidence.network: N/A — config validation tests, no API calls

assertions.issues: Missing 'type' field defaults to 'openai' silently, so error message references missing 'api_key' rather than missing 'type'. Error is still clear enough to diagnose. OAuth URL fields (auth_url, token_url) are not validated at startup.

assertions.title: OAuth backend with streaming — SSE responses proxied correctly

steps.action: Attempt streaming request to copilot/gpt-4o with stream:true
steps.expected: SSE stream with data: lines and data: [DONE]
steps.observed: Error: copilot token exchange failed with 404 — no active Copilot subscription

steps.action: Attempt streaming request to codex/o4-mini with stream:true
steps.expected: SSE stream with data: lines and data: [DONE]
steps.observed: Error: Codex authentication required; complete OAuth setup via the web UI

steps.action: Check health endpoint for OAuth backend status
steps.observed: Both copilot and codex show authenticated:false, token_state:missing

evidence.network: POST /v1/chat/completions -> 502 (copilot: token exchange 404), POST /v1/chat/completions -> 502 (codex: no token)

assertions.issues: Neither OAuth backend has valid authentication. Copilot token exchange returns 404 (no active Copilot subscription for this GitHub account). Codex has no OAuth token (PKCE flow not completed). Cannot verify SSE streaming behavior.

assertions.title: Multiple clients with different OAuth backends — per-client access

steps.action: Inspect test config (config-test-oauth-ui.yaml) for client-specific configuration
steps.expected: Clients section with per-client backend_keys or access scopes
steps.observed: Config only has server.api_keys with a single shared key. No clients[] section exists.

assertions.issues: No client-specific access control configured in test config. Cannot test per-client routing/access control without multiple client configurations defined.

blockers.description: No active GitHub Copilot subscription — Copilot token exchange endpoint returns 404
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried codex backend as fallback, also blocked due to missing OAuth token

blockers.description: No Codex OAuth token — PKCE flow not completed, no stored token file
No client-specific configuration (no clients[] section with backend_keys) in test config
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected config — only server.api_keys present, no per-client scoping

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CROSS-016: config validation catches missing required fields), 2 blocked (VAL-CROSS-017: no OAuth tokens available for streaming test; VAL-CROSS-018: no client-specific access control in test config).
